conventions.errorHandling: Explicit try/catch for async boundaries, never swallow errors; return typed Result objects from lib functions
conventions.dependencyPolicy: No new dependencies without tech lead approval
conventions.secretsPolicy: No hardcoded secrets; config from environment with schema validation
conventions.fileStructure: Small files, co-located tests when practical, explicit imports (no barrel re-exports)

status.src/services/ingest.ts: exists (stub consumes JSON artifacts, writes to storage stub)
status.src/services/compute.ts: exists (currently computes on-read using in-memory cache)
status.src/api/routes/readiness.ts: exists (basic handler; no caching strategy yet)

gaps: No clear caching/precomputation strategy for readiness score
Manual override + audit trail not implemented
Validation coverage incomplete (criteria inputs need stricter schemas)
Performance targets not enforced or measured
